_comment: Configuration for WebJEA automated testing scripts. Copy to config.json and update values.

HyperV._comment2: Timeout in seconds for VM operations
HyperV._comment3: Delay in seconds between starting DC and web server

Credentials._comment: Credentials for PowerShell Direct and web authentication
Credentials._comment2: Password should be stored securely - consider using SecretManagement module
Credentials._comment4: Store passwords with PowerShell SecretManagement instead of plaintext.
Credentials._comment5: Install SecretManagement modules: Install-Module Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretManagement, Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretStore -Force
Credentials._comment6: Register a vault (example using SecretStore): Register-SecretVault -Name SecretStore -ModuleName Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretStore -DefaultVault
Credentials._comment3: Alternative: path to XML credential file exported with Export-Clixml

GitHub._comment2: Leave empty for latest, or specify a tag like 'v1.2.0'
GitHub._comment3: Asset name pattern to match in the release (supports wildcards)

Deployment._comment: Paths on the target VM for deployment
Deployment._comment2: Path on the VM where settings.conf should be copied from (local to script runner)

WebServer._comment: Web server configuration for integration tests
WebServer._comment2: Set to true to ignore SSL certificate errors (self-signed certs)
WebServer._comment3: Timeout in seconds for web requests

IntegrationTests._comment2: Tags to include or exclude from test runs
IntegrationTests._comment3: Maximum test execution time in minutes

WindowsUpdate._comment: Windows Update configuration for maintenance script
WindowsUpdate._comment2: Categories to include: Security, Critical, Definition, Feature, Update
WindowsUpdate._comment3: Whether to automatically reboot if required
WindowsUpdate._comment4: Maximum time in minutes to wait for updates to complete

Logging._comment2: Number of days to retain log files
